name: 女娲
examples_zh: 基于公开访谈和文章蒸馏费曼的问题拆解方式，生成一个用于物理学习辅导的人物 Skill。
我想提升产品决策质量，先诊断适合的思维框架，再蒸馏成可运行的人物 Skill。
更新已有的"德鲁克管理思维"Skill，加入目标管理、有效决策和复盘提问模块。
examples_en: Distill Feynman's problem-framing style from public interviews and articles into a runnable persona Skill for physics tutoring.
I want to improve product decision quality; diagnose a suitable thinking framework and turn it into a runnable persona Skill.
Update the existing "Drucker management thinking" Skill with modules for management by objectives, effective decisions, and retrospectives.
description_zh: 蒸馏人物思维框架，生成可运行的人物 Skill
description_en: Distill thinking frameworks from people and generate runnable persona Skills
